entry.title: Re: Where is the reference3 field in supplier invoice
entry.content:
Hi yrjin,

Just to clarify are you using the Create Supplier Invoice app or the Create Supplier Invoice app - Advanced?

The script calls out for Advanced

I don't have Korea enabled in my system, so I can't double check

Here is the link to the Help:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/6418c31b58e840619e5e74885df6d3b4/50bbcea64ef94acd9a6d1eebcd7399f7.html?locale=en-US

"To enter data in the reference 3-field this field must be customized accordingly with field status groups. To get to this field press the ‘more data’ button on the expense line. The information entered in the expense line item of the document is displayed in the entertainment expense list. Enter the address, company name and representative of the payment recipient in the text line of the expense line item. "

I hope this helps

Thank you

Jerry

entry.title: SAP Build Apps corrupted version history
entry.content:
Hello everyone, I need help urgently,

Today, an error occurred while saving my project changes, and then I lost a significant part of a very important logic in my application. Additionally, the version history is corrupted

My project has been running for several months, but the oldest history shown is from 12 hours ago. Is there any way to view older histories to try and recover a version? as these recent ones are corrupted!

I'm asking for your help because I've lost a lot of work!

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Register new Service Unit in Cloud Control Center

hi Eun seok

Service unit is up

 

And sld agents

 

 

I still cannot add instance Databases to create Common Database. I need to add these to create a new Service Unit

entry.title: SAP BUILD PROCESS AUTOMATION GETTING ERROR 500 IN RBSC PORTAL FOR AGENT UPDATE
entry.content:
Hello all,

i am getting error in SAP BUILD PROCESS AUTOMATION ( for setting up Desktop Agent 3) while going to SAP BUILD LOBBY > CONTROL TOWER > AGENT UPDATE > RBSC PORTAL 

 

 

 

ERROR - 

 

If anyone has any clue of why this error is coming up please do let me know too. Since i can't find any relevant blog post.

 

Thanks,

Rahul Pillai

SAP Build Process Automation SAP Build Apps

entry.title: Re: how to register Web Client on Cloud Control Center
entry.content:
Hello,

Web Client needs to be registered in the software components beforehand.

 

Regards

EunSeok

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps corrupted version history
entry.content:
There is few bugs with that as now as far as i observed. 

Additional there is no way we could get backup of very old roll back. 

In that case what i used to do is to get backup after every major update in logic. Like export the project as mtar file and rename files to V1(Version 1), V2(Version2) and so on. 

and note the changes made to each version in a Excel sheet.

Thanks.

Rahul

entry.title: Re: Register new Service Unit in Cloud Control Center
entry.content: I see you use "b1cadm" user for authentication. however the user is typcially meant to be a B1 Cloud Administrator user to authenticat the Cloud Control Center as an administrator. To authenticate DB server you need to input DB user such as "SYSTEM".

entry.title: Re: Vendor Rebates - SAP S4HANA
entry.content: This article is very informative. Keep it up!

entry.title: Re: Where is the reference3 field in supplier invoice
entry.content: Thank you for your reply. I used the advanced.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps corrupted version history
entry.content:
Hi Rahul,

I also haven't noticed many bugs, and I'm concerned because this was the first time it happened!

The backup that would help me is from no more than two weeks ago, it's not very old.

I'll continue looking for a way to recover the lost logic. Thank you for the tip about version control!

entry.title: Re: Fiori My Paystubs V3 download button not displaying on Android devices
entry.content: Hi Kenneth, SuccesssFactors mobile app does not support Fiori My Paystubs - https://me.sap.com/notes/0002736531 . If your question is concerning mobile browser experience, then please create a support ticket for our team to investigate.

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation - Test mail not working
entry.content:
I have created a destination for sending mail from SAP Process Automation. All the properties are added correctly as mentioned in the below blogs. Even though when I try to test the mail functionality I got error.

Blogs:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/send-emails-from-automation-without-outlook-in-sap-process-automation/ba-p/13542436 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/mail-destination-on-sap-build-process-automation/qaq-p/12654497

Destination: 

 

Note: The Gmail password I generated was in the below format, so entered the same with whitespaces
           abcd efgh ijkl mnop

entry.title: Re: How do we dynamically add or map link in forms create...
entry.content: Hello Dan,

entry.title: Re: Seasonal Maintenance strategy
entry.content: Greetings. I believe that in a multiple counter plan only one dimension can be time based (error message IP493).)

entry.title: Re: EWM LOSC - how to choose any source HU
entry.content: Hi Juergen,thank you for the answer. My process is following: 1) from receiving putaway into destination st. type 20202) Replenishment with LOSC from st. type 2020 - inter st. type REPV - destination st. type 2030  - it works fine in case I configured HU WH task to be created (two WT created for HU, first from 2020 to REPV, second B from REPV to 2030). System choose source HU and present it to user for picking, user pick by queue and scan source HU selected by system. Anyway, I dont want to system select source HU, I would like to let user to decide and select HU during first pick. Its possible if I change configuration to create product HU - but at this case the LOSC doesnt work and system creates only one WT - from 2020 to 2030 (but the user can scan any source HU). I believe the reason is, the system creates Product WH task and LOSC is not activated as LOSC requiring to have HU WH task.....

entry.title: Re: How do we dynamically add or map link in forms create...
entry.content: Hello Dan, I want to provide a dynamically read the link value from some earlier step in the process and then populate the link dynamically through a varibale/paramater inside the form. Thank you

entry.title: Re: EWM LOSC - how to choose any source HU
entry.content: Sorry for formating, it didnt let me to change it. also I did typo, i wrote "Its possible if I change configuration to create product HU" but i meant "Its possible if I change configuration to create product WT"

entry.title: Re: How do we dynamically add or map link in forms create...
entry.content: Yes, you can bind the link value to some other object from a previous step. You can calculate with a decision or take from an API or whatever you want. Soon you will be able to even use a script 😺

entry.title: [BYD] Is that possible to change the planned date manually for pick task?
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

When I create the pick task in ByD system, I found the field “End Date” is read only,
This field will impact our interface between ByD and WMS system.
Could we modify this field manually?

Best regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: [BYD] Is that possible to change the planned date man...
entry.content:
Dear customer,

 

The planned end date in warehouse task comes from the requested delivery date in customer demand.

Therefore, this value cannot be changed neither from UI end nor from API side since it is calculated while checking ATP.

But you can choose change Planned Start Date & Actual Execution On instead while confirming warehouse task.

 

Best regards,

Gavan

SAP Technical Support, Public Cloud ERP

entry.title: Re: EWM LOSC - how to choose any source HU
entry.content:
Hi Stanislav,

LOSC works as well for product task with hu movement. But HU must be known. In your case LOSC should work as well if you use RFUI to confirm the task. When HU is picked to resource HU-Wt created from resource to the destination bin, and at this point of time LOSC is triggered, and resource gets open LOSC tasks to move hu to the intermediate bin.

BR,

Daniil

entry.title: Re: EWM LOSC - how to choose any source HU
entry.content: Do you mean HU must be known and first LOSC WT must be created with HU number inside? At this case its really timeconsuming as user will need to search whole pallet for specific HU (we have HU management on Box level)

entry.title: Re: Attachment mandatory for particular business users only
entry.content: I have made Attachment tab mandatory with the use of SDK. I looking for the code/syntax to make attachment necessary for particular business users only.

entry.title: Re: Attachment mandatory for particular business users only
entry.content: I have made Attachment tab mandatory with the use of SDK. I looking for the code/syntax to make attachment necessary for particular business users only with the use of SDK.

Kind regards, Bea

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps asking login for Integrations

Then in Data tab, I see he destination.

Also, the first screenshot in this thread has a name which I did not see in the tutorial.

entry.title: Re: SQL Caught Rabax
entry.content:
Hi,

The dump occurs in a Z transaction, which means it's not part of the standard SAP shipment, but was created in your customer system. So you'll have to debug it on your side. Likely there's an SQL statement which is not selective enough and returns way too many rows.

BR,
Alex

entry.title: Re: unable to delete items from Cart in Shopping App in S...
entry.content:
It is tough to diagnose without seeing more of the project (I wish we could just add a project file to a question).

Purchase Issue

The message comes about when you are sending input parameters of the wrong type. If you use developer tools, you can see the data that is being passed and make sure this confirms with the process requirements.

You can see the proper JSON in the Control Tower > Environments > Triggers

 

Delete issue

Tough to know if I do not see ... what message are you getting? What is your logic? I would think that perhaps the wrong ID is being sent to the CAP service, but it depends on what the nature of the error is.

entry.title: Re: SQL Caught Rabax
entry.content:
Hi Alex,

Since it is a Z transaction you have to enable the ST12 trace to check the overall expense SQL statement with the help of ABAPer to fix or create the Z index for the expense SQL statement to avoid the dumps.

Regards

SS

entry.title: Re: Generic ABAP utility class to upload and download Exc...
entry.content:
As I previously said, it's not a question.

Anyway, whatever you post it as a question or a blog post, you'd better describe it completely in sap.com, not explain it in the external Web site only, otherwise many people would post useless short information and require people to navigate to the Web site to understand what it is about exactly. So, to clarify, your tool has these limitations, copied from your repository:

  • ZCL_EXCEL_HANDLER is a general Excel upload/download handler class for SAP ABAP systems. It supports both XLSX and CSV file formats for uploading and downloading data between SAP and PC or application server.
     
  • FEATURES
    • Upload and download CSV files
    • Upload and download XLSX files
    • Support for both PC and application server file handling
    • Customizable CSV column separator
    • Header line handling for CSV files
    • Automatic data type conversion and validation
       
  • NOTES
    • Method upload_xlsx works only on Windows workstations with Excel installed and in foreground only (using OLE)
    • All other methods support upload and download on both PC (foreground) and application server (foreground/background)
    • The class handles data type conversions and validations automatically
    • Error handling is implemented using the ZCX_EXCEL_HANDLER exception class

entry.title: Re: Passing custom field to warehouse task
entry.content:
First of all, it is not possible to create picking task automatically after the outbound delivery is created and distributed to EWM.

It could be nice functionality for EWM. Maybe at some point of time SAP would implement it. Would be great to have some kind of automation which is triggered after creation or change of the object. If it be with flexible conditions for execution, it could be named something like "after processing framework" or similar.

entry.title: Re: SAP DM - ERP - EWM Integration/Staging Problems
entry.content:
Hello,

Please check if you see the Staging method download when an order is received on the DMC side? If not, the settings and master data for Staging need to be verified.

  1. /SCWM/PSASTAGE
  2. Activate PPF for sending
  3. Activate and properly configure the web services

entry.title: Re: EWM LOSC - how to choose any source HU
entry.content:
"Anyway, I dont want to system select source HU, I would like to let user to decide and select HU during first pick. Its possible if I change configuration to create product HU - but at this case the LOSC doesnt work and system creates only one WT - from 2020 to 2030 (but the user can scan any source HU). I believe the reason is, the system creates Product WH task and LOSC is not activated as LOSC requiring to have HU WH task....."

Then you do what Daniil describes. You process the WT with RF, then LOSC is working, also if there is no HU WT at the beginning.

Brgds

Juergen

entry.title: Re: SQL Caught Rabax
entry.content: Indexing of the question: SQL_CAUGHT_RABAX, TSV_TNEW_PAGE_ALLOC_FAILED.

entry.title: Re: 🚀 **Unlock the Power of Dynamic Attributes in SAP Commerce Cloud - Must-Watch Video!** 🚀
entry.content:

Here is the right link of the video "Applying Dynamic Attributes in SAP Commerce Cloud"

entry.title: Best Approach for Master Data Integration from SuccessFactors(SF) to S/4 HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are planning to implement master data integration from SuccessFactors(SF) to S/4 HANA Public Cloud. I would like to know the best approach for this integration. specifically

1. Should we use SAP Cloud Platform Integration (CPI) or SAP Master Data Integration (MDI) for this purpose?

2. Are there any additional recommended tools or services required to facilitate this integration

From My Research, I found that SAP MDI is often recommended for such integrations. also I found there are no standard Cost center and Organizational integration in SAP CPI for S4 HANA Public Cloud.

There is Standard I-flow for Employee Data Replication in SAP CPI but as per below post it should be used if our SAP S/4 HANA CLOUD is below 2308 Release. 

Link to the blog : Integrate SAP S4 HANA Cloud/on-premise with Succes... - SAP Community

However, I came across another blog that mentioned MDI is Moved to ABAP Adapter concept.

Link to the blog : Configuring the replication of Cost Centers from S... - SAP Community

Any insights, experiences, or updated information on this would be greatly appreciated,

Thankyou,

Anil

SAP Integration Suite  SAP S/4HANA Cloud Master Data  SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central

entry.title: Re: SQL Caught Rabax
entry.content: No need to use ST12, the faulty SELECT is shown in the short dump, and it's not an index problem, the problem has been explained by @alex_frank.

entry.content:

Good day! I just wanted to confirm if what is the logic of courses being displayed on the Required Learning Section? Does it follow the learning plan configuration of display threshold? learningPlanRequiredItemsDisplayThreshold=90? In addition, can we rename the "Required Learning" tile to something else? Can we reword?

Hoping someone can enlighten me. Thank you for the help, I highly appreciate it

Best Regards,

Wayne

Please advise

entry.title: Re: SQL Caught Rabax
entry.content: It's not a database space problem, the problem has been explained by @alex_frank.

entry.title: Re: Creating Down Payment request without reference to an...
entry.content:
Dear Amar,

When you create Down Payment request in App Manage Supplier Down Payment Requests, keeping Purchasing Doc. Item field blank, resulting in following error(ME706):
"Item 00000 of purchasing document xxxxxxxxxx does not exist"

It is standard behavior to create PO item level Down Payment so that Down Payment request can be created with reference to PO.

It is a standard system design that in FI document you have to enter always PO + Item. It is not possible to enter only PO without item. Otherwise functions like PO history update would not work. This means the functionality to enter just a PO does not exists.

If you feel that the SAP S/4HANA public cloud customer base would benefit from an enhancement of this functionality you can raise a feature request via http://influence.sap.com.
KBA 2963059 - How to Submit Feature Requests for SAP S/4 HANA Cloud Product

Best regards,
Patrick

entry.title: Re: Difference between SAP S/4HANA :Public Vs Private edition : RISE with SAP
entry.content: Insightful knowledge shared. Thanks 😊

entry.title: Re: How to load customers (business partners) with SAP S/4HANA data migration cockpit
entry.content:
Hi @daniel_cunha1 ,

did you use the Vendor (extend by organizational unit) object?
Then it should only add the roles and the corresponding views.

Best regards,
Alex

entry.title: Re: Over-Delivery Qty Tolerance with the customer credit...
entry.content:
Hello,

Have to tried the "Overdeliv. Tolerance" setting in the Customer Master - Shipping Tab?

entry.title: Re: Combining MTO and MTS Processes for a Single Material in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Yes, it is possible to manage a single material using both Make-to-Order (MTO) and Make-to-Stock (MTS) processes simultaneously in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud. This is typically achieved by configuring different sales order types or settings for different scenarios. To enable this functionality, as an SD consultant, you need to configure the following: Material Master Settings: Configure the material master record with different MTO and MTS settings. You may use different production versions or settings for procurement types (e.g., 'E' for MTO and 'F' for MTS). Sales Order Types: Set up sales order types to handle MTO and MTS orders separately. This allows you to define different order types for different processes, which will be linked to the respective production strategies. Customization in SAP Fiori: Ensure that the Fiori apps and screens used for order processing are set up to handle both MTO and MTS processes as per your requirements. Production and Planning Settings: Configure the relevant settings in the Production Planning (PP) module to support both MTO and MTS scenarios for the same material. This includes ensuring that MTO and MTS orders can be processed and managed correctly. Consult the SAP documentation and configuration guides specific to S/4HANA Public Cloud for detailed steps and best practices. Thank you!

labcorp patient portal

entry.title: Re: -147 Get CurrentUserInfo failed on SAP connection using DI API
entry.content:
Hi @ANKIT_CHAUHAN ,

Kind regards,
Nicole.

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA Public cloud_Advanced Variant Configuration_Dependency vs characteristics Assignment

entry.title: Posting GR for HU's of inbound delivery in background
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm searching for a solution for posting GR for each HU's of an inbound delivery in background on ECC system .

I've read the other topics related to this but I didn't found anything helpful. It is any BAPI/FM available for this ?

entry.title: Re: EWM LOSC - how to choose any source HU
entry.content: no, you can keep the availability level on the bin, first you should get open product WT for picking ( without LOSC ). When picking is done with rfui the picking task is confirmed to the rsrc and followup task is created from rsrc to the dest. bin, here you have already a HU (pickHU or srcHU which you fully picked) ( and it is a HU task ) so LOSC works.

entry.title: Re: Over-Delivery Qty Tolerance with the customer credit...
entry.content: No brother jignesh, i did not tried the Overdeliv. Tolerance, Can you please elaborate here more ?

entry.title: Single invoice for multiple Purchase order for Material and Service
entry.content:
Dear Experts ,

We have the following Requirement : Supplier creates single Invoice against multiple Purchase orders referring to same outline agreement(Contract) approx 500 line material & services items from SAP Business network

Product used by the client : SAP Ariba Commerce Automation.

we have the option of using Summary invoice for this requirement but it has few limitations such as cannot be implemented for Service PO and Summary invoice is done with respect to PO and not with respect to Goods receipt, the client wants to create invoice with respect to GRN . 

Have you come across such a business situation .if yes , how did you deal with it 

Thanks & Regards

Rithvik.R

entry.title: Re: Reverse notes receivable in F-20
entry.content:
Hello,

F-20 is for clearing bills of exchange and reverse liabilitities. There is no specific flag or process to deal with dishonored bills of exchange. You may use FBRA or FB08 to reverse bill of exchange posting for dishonored bills of exchange.  

Hope this would help.

entry.title: Re: Centralize Authorization Management of SAP Cloud ALM Using the Identity Provisioning Service
entry.content: @MatthiasL, that is right. One of the two approaches could be used.

entry.title: Which API can support movement type 701/702 to post goods movement?
entry.content:
We want to find the api to realize post goods movement through use movement type 701/702,

whether can use api Material Documents - Read, Create?

Pls help us to find out that api, thanks.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Which API can support movement type 701/702 to post g...
entry.content:
Movement type 701 is only intended for difference posting for physical inventory documents. You need to use API Physical Inventory Documents - Read, Create (API_PHYSICAL_INVENTORY_DOC) for it.

Please refer to this online documentation for detailed information:
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/3f57e7df4a114edabffe8b2d581a59ed/58361658745b1f60e10000000a44147b.html?locale=en-US

entry.title: Re: Present multiple translated documents in a SAP Enable...
entry.content: Hello Shane, those instructions worked for me. Thank you. Regards Andrew

entry.title: Mandatory partner function is missing for purchasing org
entry.content:
Hi Colleagues,

We are trying to create an external BP , get into the CR screen and under ERP vendor adding a vendor and get this error. 

Mandatory partner function VN is missing for purchasing org. 1000
Mandatory partner function PI is missing for purchasing org. 1000
Mandatory partner function OA is missing for purchasing org. 1000

 

Purchase org is derived via BRF+.

 

I debugged the supplier handler class and not sure why the structure VMDS_EI_FUNCTIONS (VMDS_EI_FUNCTIONS_T )is not filled. 

 

 

Table WYT3 is partner function 

Table TPAUM is Business partner: Language conversion for partner functions

 

Could you check this please and let me know as how to proceed?

 

 

regards

Chandra.

entry.title: Re: Extractor for Table AFVC, AFPO, AFKO
entry.content:
Hello,

any suggestions or ideas?

entry.title: Re: SAP Build app transaction data not being saved to Vis...
entry.content: Depratihari, there rae still two things you should check: 1 - you use "Custom object" option as the source of data for new record - how do you map values in this "custom object"? Each input field must have the "Value" property mapped to some variable; 2 - what is the linkage between your input fields and the custom object you use as the source of data for the new record? When you click the "Custom object" property of your "create record" block, you should map the variable, used as "Value" for the input field to the particular property of the "Custom object" in your "Create record" block..

entry.title: Re: Is it Possible in SAC to split a line chart into mult...
entry.content:
Hi,

Trellis  option you can make use here to split the original Line chart into multiple charts based on 'Product' dimension in your case. Here is example where the simple line chart has been split based on Product.

Thanks,

Venkat

entry.title: Re: Treetable minRow count with Interactive rowMode
entry.content: Hi, yesss, that works perfect. When testing your answer I initially I just missed the include xmlns:mode="sap.ui.table.rowmodes"

entry.title: Re: Over-Delivery Qty Tolerance with the customer credit...
entry.content: I Just tried that and will not work with us, My case is limited to the customer credit limit is must, the tolerance is not fixed percentage or fixed amount, it is only the extra value added by the tolerance quantity in the delivery level, so if the Credit limit + Tolerance value is equal to sales value , Then accept to exceed the credit limit for the customer , Got my point jignesh ?

entry.title: SAP Stammtisch Magdeburg Sommertreffen
entry.content:
🌞Save the Date: SAP Stammtisch Sommertreffen 🌞

Unser nächstes SAP Stammtisch Treffen findet am Montag, den 29.07.2024 um 19:00 Uhr statt – dieses Mal offline, auf der Terrasse des S4Campus in Magdeburg!

Weitere Informationen findet ihr auf unserer Community-Seite!

Wir sehen uns dort! 🚀

______

🌞Save the Date: SAP Stammtisch summer meeting 🌞

Our next SAP Stammtisch meeting will take place on Monday, July 29, 2024 at 7:00 p.m. - this time offline, on the terrace of the S4Campus in Magdeburg!
You can find more information on our community page!

See you there! 🚀

entry.title: Re: SAP Build app transaction data not being saved to Vis...
entry.content: And one more thing: have you changed anything in your VCF AFTER you deployed it? If so, please try to deploy your VCF once again and update the integration in your application project. I had once issues with the VCF when I made changes in the entity definition but then I forgot to redeploy the changed VCF and to update the integration.

entry.title: Formula for value on a component in a BOM... or suggestions for the right direction
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a question regarding BOM formulas for calculating ink cartridge consumption in a printing company scenario.

Scenario:

I use a BOM to manage ink cartridges for printed labels. The current formula calculates ink based on a ratio (e.g., 5 cartridges per 1000 sheets). However, this results in underestimation for quantities exceeding the base unit (1000 sheets).

For example:

  • Printing 1100 sheets should require 10 cartridges, not 5.1 (rounded to 6) or 5 (standard rounding).
  • Printing 3000 sheets should require 15 cartridges.

Desired Functionality:

I'd like to implement a rounding rule in the BOM that mimics Excel's "CEILING" function. This would ensure we account for the full cartridge needed when exceeding the base quantity.

Formula Example that I can use (if it is possible to insert it on SAP):

ROUND(Order Quantity / 1000 sheets) * Cartridge Consumption Rate

Using this formula with the 1100 sheet example:

  • ROUND(1100 sheets / 1000 sheets) * 5 cartridges= round( 1,1) * 5 = 2 * 5 = 10 cartridges

Question:

Can I achieve this rounding behavior using CS02 or another standard SAP transaction?

Additional Notes:

  • The number of cartridges per label can vary depending on customer colour requests (3, 4, etc.).
  • BOM variants are not suitable as customer order volumes are unpredictable (1000, 1,000,000, or 10,000,000 labels).

Reason for Request:

This functionality is crucial for accurate cost estimation in CK11N, which the finance department uses to understand material costs per printed label.

Looking Forward:

Appreciate any suggestions on achieving the desired rounding behavior within the BOM structure. If there are limitations in the standard functionality, please let me know what alternative solutions I can explore. I'm in production and not an SAP expert, but I'm happy to learn new things if you can point me in the right direction. 😀

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Maintenance Plan Call Scheduling type/status
entry.content: IP19 will do. Navigate to Maintenance item there.

entry.title: SAP Stammtisch Sommertreffen am 29.07.2024
entry.content:
Wir freuen uns, euch zum SAP Stammtisch Sommertreffen einzuladen! Wie im letzten Jahr findet unser Juli-Stammtisch nicht online, sondern in Präsenz auf der Terrasse des UCC (Erzbergerstraße 1, 39104 Magdeburg) statt.

Neben einer entspannten Atmosphäre mit Verpflegung und Getränken erwarten euch auch spannende, spontane Themen. Eine großartige Gelegenheit, sich auszutauschen, zu vernetzen und neue Ideen zu entwickeln!

👨‍💻👩‍💻Spoiler Alert: Wir arbeiten an der Idee eines firmenübergreifenden Hackathons, der voraussichtlich im September stattfinden wird. Das Juli-Treffen ist die perfekte Gelegenheit, diese Idee vorzustellen, Erwartungen und Wünsche zu sammeln und vielleicht schon erste Teams zusammenzustellen. Wir suchen eure Ideen, Interessen und Angebote – auch über SAP hinaus!

✉️Bitte meldet Euch für die Planung per E-Mail an magdeburg@sapstammtisch.org oder über das Event in der SAP Community an.

Bei Interesse oder Fragen könnt ihr uns gerne auch vorab per E-Mail kontaktieren.

Wir freuen uns auf eure Teilnahme!

______

We are pleased to invite you to the SAP Stammtisch summer meeting! As last year, our July regulars' table will not take place online, but in person on the terrace of the UCC (Erzbergerstraße 1, 39104 Magdeburg).

In addition to a relaxed atmosphere with food and drinks, you can also expect exciting, spontaneous topics. A great opportunity to exchange ideas, network and develop new ones!

Spoiler Alert: We are working on the idea of a cross-company hackathon, which is expected to take place in September. The July meeting is the perfect opportunity to present this idea, gather expectations and wishes and perhaps already put together the first teams. We are looking for your ideas, interests and offers - also beyond SAP!

Please register for the planning by e-mail to magdeburg@sapstammtisch.org or via the event in the SAP Community.

If you are interested or have any questions, you can also contact us in advance by e-mail.

We look forward to your participation!

entry.title: "CST No." "" (for "Location" "asigned to "Warehouse" "" and assigned to "Branch" ") does not match
entry.content:
Dear all,

I am facing error while generated update the warehouse location.  Error like : 

"CST No." "" (for "Location" "Gurugram-1", assigned to "Warehouse" "Gurugram Storage 2" and assigned to "Branch" "GURUGRAM") does not match "Branch GST No." XXXXXXXXXX

SAP Business One, 

When I am changing the Location into warehouse master under same branch then facing this type of error. 

Regards,

Nikunj Mehta

entry.title: Re: How to add Params:warningAcknowledged and workflowCon...
entry.content:
Solved.

Parameter need to add into <uri> tag.  In CPI, Message Mapping cases as below.

entry.title: Re: Dynamic Text Size based on device type in SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
Hi Dan,

Thanks for your response!!

The system variable does not work, neither on desktop browser nor on mobile browser. 

"systemVars.runtime".

entry.title: Re: Dynamic Text Size based on device type in SAP Build Apps
entry.content: Hi Dan,

entry.title: Re: Dynamic Text Size based on device type in SAP Build Apps
entry.content: Hi Dan,

entry.title: BAPI_PLANNEDORDER_CREATE: Shift basic finish date to next workday not possible
entry.content:
Hi experts,

we use the BAPI BAPI_PLANNEDORDER_CREATE to create planned orders. If the basic finish date is not a work day, the date is shifted to the previous work day. Also while creating manually a planned order with transaction code MD11 the system shifts the basic finish date to the previous workday if  this day is not a workday. That leads to my question: Is it possible to force SAP to shift the date to the next work day instead to the previous workday? I can't find neither a customizing setting nor a BAPI import parameter.

entry.title: Feature "reassign" inside the CPQ and inside the quote is needed
entry.content:
Currently it is not possible to use the feature "reassign" inside the quote in C4C.

And when landing from C4C to CPQ, there is no My Quotes page available.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Feature "reassign" inside the CPQ and inside the quot...
entry.content:
Users who land on the landing page from C4C to CPQ, cannot access the Load Existing Project/Quotation page (My Quotes page), so they’ll always land on the quote that they’ve opened in SAP Cloud for Customer.

Other than the quote, the only pages users have access to are User Page and Quote Layout under the Setup icon.

Additionally, administrator users also have access to the following pages: Setup, Log, and Developer Console.

All of this is explained in this help document: https://help.sap.com/doc/f72edd8bc0ca43b5b9727fdbdaf73cfc/2405/en-US/f8edda558a4b4d1fb6ee6d515f4a5e30.pdf

 

If you need the Reassign button to show up inside the quote, then you will need to enable the Reassign action under Workflow for the required quote status.

Please find the below help links on how to enable Actions in Workflow:

Workflow Permissions | SAP Help Portal

Workflow | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Re: SAP Master Data Governance solutions compared to each other. Get a quick overview.
entry.content: Thanks Andreas for this comprehensive overview!

entry.title: How to do authorization check for personnel no (PERNR) in PM order confirmation
entry.content:
Hi SAP PM Guru, 

Business requires to add personnel no check during order confirmation to ensure only authorized personnel is allowed to do confirmation.

There are 2 options:

1. Personnel no. is specified in work center capacity. 

2. Personnel no. is linked to HR infotype 1001 (relationship) for qualification control. 

For either of the above mentioned, is there any authorization object which can be added in confirmation?

Please kindly help.

Sally

entry.title: How to import inspection plan in Bulk
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

We have to create a lot of inspection plans in SAP and we could not find any chance to upload the inspection plan.
May you kindly suggest how we could upload it?

Thank you and BR


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to import inspection plan in Bulk
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

SAP Business ByDesign doesn't support importing inspection plan in bulk, you need to create manually. Please refer to help document Create an Inspection Plan.

We recommend you to post your query in SAP Business ByDesign Customer Influence Forum https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/886 so that our development can look into it. Please note you may search it firstly and if it is not found, please register your requirement for this new feature.

Other customers can then vote for it, which will assert its legitimacy as a standard feature by showing the industry need and in turn influence the implementation schedule of the requirement.

Henry

SAP Support

entry.title: Welcome to the SAP Academic Board Iberoamerica members for 2025-2027!
entry.content:
Dear

SAP University Alliances Iberoamerican Community, 

We would like to welcome our successor of the SAP Academic Board Iberoamerican members for 2025-2027 and thank them for their engagement in wanting to fulfil this challenging mandate, as follows: 

  • Jesús Aguilar. Tecnológico de Monterrey (MX). Chair
  • Rafael Monterde. Universitat Politècnica de València (ES). Vice Chair.
  • Andrea del Pilar Jimenez. Universidad El Bosque (CO). Secretary.
  • Suzette Morrison. Excelsior Community College (JM). Board member.
  • Jorge Carrola. Universidade Nova de Lisboa (PT). Board member.
  • Andrea Ollo. Universidad Pública de Navarra (ES). Board member.
  • Alfredo Armijos. Escuela Politécnica del Litoral (EC). Board member.  .
  • Julissa Cortés. Universidad Tecnológica Centroamericana (HN). Board member.

Special thanks to those academics who were were supporting and involved in the process of the election of this successor Regional Academic Board. We also would like to thank to the participation and engagement to the outgoing ABI members.

SAP University Alliances

entry.title: Re: Business Partner Customer Vendor Integration (CVI) with update possibilities using BAPI
entry.content:
Hello @d024348 ,

As this FM, CMD_MIG_BP_CVI_CREATE is a migration cockpit related program, is it recommended to use it with Data services? 

If not can you please suggest any other FM/ BAPI which can be used to create BPs with customer data like, company code, address, dunning, sales etc..

Thank you.
Het Patel

entry.title: Read Header Approval USD in PR
entry.content:
Hi Expert 

I have an issue here. I already set workflow PR in the header level. However, after creating PR in USD, the total net price is converted into IDR automatically. Is this normal during the procurement process? Is there any configuration to this, so SAP can read the workflow in the header level?

entry.title: Task 7 - Using CQL in an unbound function implementation (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs")
entry.content:
This is a task in the July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs".

This task sees you creating a third service, and a first API endpoint within that service. Unlike the previous two services this service will be a more fully formed OData service complete with some sample data. Ready?

Background

The previous two services in this month's Developer Challenge, basic and plain, were fairly simple and only contained API endpoints that were based on simple functions and an action. There were no entities defined in the CDS model, no data, and no implicit, out-of-the-box CRUD+Q OData operations involved. Today's task is where that changes.

Northwind and Northbreeze

For this task and the rest of the tasks this month (there are 4 more after this one), you'll make available API endpoints that all revolve around a simple data model based off the famous Northwind service, various versions of which are running at https://services.odata.org. As you can see from the OData V4 Northwind service's service document there are quite a few "collections", otherwise known by the OData term "entity sets", including:

  • Categories
  • CustomerDemographics
  • Customers
  • Employees
  • Orders
  • Categories
  • Products
  • Regions
  • Shippers
  • Suppliers
  • ...

I like to keep things simple, and often turn to a simplified version that I like to call "Northbreeze" (geddit?), where I just have three entity types, with relations between them:

  • Categories
  • Products
  • Suppliers

I have a live Northbreeze service running at https://qmacro.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/northbreeze and this is based on a simple CAP service that I've defined and made available in a GitHub repo at qmacro/northbreeze. As you can see, there's no actual code, there's just:

  • the schema-level definition of Categories, Products and Suppliers
  • CSV based data to seed the three entity sets that correspond to those entity types
  • an extremely simple service exposing those three entity types via direct projections

And that's pretty much it. Note that the data reflects as accurately as possible the data in the original Northwind service, i.e. there are 77 products ranging from Chai, in the Beverages category, from the supplier Exotic Liquids to Original Frankfurter grüne Soße, in the Condiments category, from the supplier Plutzer Lebensmittelgroßmärkte AG.

You can (and I recommend that you do) clone the repo and use that as a starting point for the service for this and the subsequent tasks in this challenge.

The requirements

Here are the specific requirements for this task.

The service must be served using the OData V4 protocol, with the (default) path prefix /odata/v4 plus the service name northbreeze, i.e.:

/odata/v4/northbreeze
You must make an API endpoint available that returns a sort of "product information" string. The endpoint has a single integer parameter id and the TESTER will make a call to the endpoint with the value of a product ID (it will be between 1 and 77).

It should return a string, formed thus:

<name of the product> by <name of the supplier>

For example, let's take the Northbreeze product with the ID 11:

  • the product name is Queso Cabrales
  • the name of the product's supplier is Cooperativa de Quesos 'Las Cabras'

So the call would be made to:

/odata/v4/northbreeze/productInfo(id=11)
and the expected response should be:
{
  "@odata.context": "$metadata#Edm.String",
  "value": "Queso Cabrales by Cooperativa de Quesos 'Las Cabras'"
}
By the way, looking back at the OData query operation URLs for the supplier of Queso Cabrales just now, did you know that for such scalar properties returned for OData query or read operations (CompanyName in this example) you can get the literal value on its own? Just append /$value to the URL, so that

https://qmacro.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/northbreeze/Products(11)/Supplier/CompanyName

becomes

https://qmacro.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/northbreeze/Products(11)/Supplier/CompanyName/$value

and you get

Cooperativa de Quesos 'Las Cabras'
instead of
{
  "@odata.context": "../../$metadata#Suppliers(5)/CompanyName",
  "value": "Cooperativa de Quesos 'Las Cabras'"
}

The endpoint definition

As you may have worked out by now, this API endpoint needs to be defined as an unbound function (yes, it could be implemented as a function bound to a particular product but we'll be doing that sort of thing in a later task).

The endpoint implementation

The idea of this task is to get you using some CQL. In other words, you'll have to write a simple implementation for this unbound function, writing a handler for the on hook as usual, for the productInfo event.

CQL

If you're not sure where to start, I'd recommend the Querying in JavaScript section of Capire, in particular the SELECT class. Within that SELECT section, you may want to pay particular attention to the following properties:

  • one
  • from
  • columns
  • where

In particular, you'll have to work out how to get a property of a related entity. In other words, how do you express what you want, using the facilities such as path expressions or projection functions described in the columns section. On this topic, you may find this blog post helpful: Turning an OData expand into a cds.ql CQL query with a projection function in CAP.

Using async/await

One more tip: Up until now, you've defined your JavaScript function based handlers for functions and actions in quite a straightforward way. But now you're about to use the SELECT class, which by itself defines a query. It doesn't run it directly. If you read the Executing Queries section of Capire you'll see that "you can just await a constructed query, which by default passes the query to cds.db.run()". That means you can use await in front of your SELECT expression.

But that in turn means that your handler function needs to be defined as an asynchronous one, with async. If you're looking for some examples or inspiration, remember that there are some great CAP samples in the sap-samples org on GitHub. And remember also that GitHub has an excellent search mechanism, where you can express detailed contextual searches, like this one:

org:sap-samples language:js "await SELECT" AND (path:/srv/)

Don't you just love it when you come across a well thought out URL scheme for this sort of search facility? Beautiful.

Setting up for CQL

Note that also, for this handler function and some of the subsequent ones in this service, you'll need a connection to the database layer, and a 'handle' on the Products entity definition (to use in your SELECT expressions, specifically with the .from() method). You can just use this classic pair of constant definitions, before you start to define your on handler:

const db = await cds.connect.to('db')
const { Products } = db.entities

Submitting to the TESTER

Now you're ready to submit your CANDIDATE service, with this new API endpoint, to the TESTER!

The payload

The task identifier you need to supply in the payload of your submission is: northbreeze-productInfo.

You'll have already done this sort of thing previously so just head back there for the more detailed instructions if you need them, or to the the section titled "The Tester service, and making a test request" in the main challenge blog post.

You'll need to submit a JSON payload like this:

{
  "communityid": "<your-community-id>",
  "serviceurl": "<the-URL-of-your-service>",
  "task": "northbreeze-productInfo"
}
And, just as with the previous (and all further tasks):

  • the value for the communityid property should be your ID on this SAP Community platform (e.g. mine is "qmacro")

  • the value for the serviceurl property should be the absolute URL (i.e. including the scheme), of your CANDIDATE service which contains the API endpoint (see ℹ️ A note on URLs and services).

That's it!

Logging of test results

Remember that you can check on your progress, and the progress of your fellow participants - all requests are logged and are available in an entity set served by the TESTER service. The entity set URL is https://developer-challenge-2024-07.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/tester/Testlog and being an OData V4 entity set, all the normal OData system query options are available to you for digging into that information.

Until the next task, have fun, and if you have any questions or comments, leave them below!

entry.title: Re: Physical inventory in EWM for mass materials
entry.content: Hi, not sure what exactly you mean - the inventory document creation can be done in mass in standard T-code /scwm/pi_create - just enter the details like all storage bins and click on create - it will create inventory documents based on the data you entered, can be automatically split by inventory area you setup.  The count should be process for every single record (ie go to the bin, count material, record result). The post is select all lines and push the post in /scwm/PI_PROCESS....

entry.title: BAPI/ FM to load Customer master data with Data services
entry.content:
Hello experts,

Can you please suggest a BAPI/ FM that can be used to create a BP along with customer data like Company code, Address, sales etc..

We checked out RFC_CVI_EI_INBOUND_MAIN, but this is consuming the number range even when we are not committing the changes (i.e. IV_DOCOMMIT = " ").

Thank you so much for your help in advance!

Best Regards,
Het Patel
